lemon_market_new_listings.description: This well-maintained vehicle is in good condition and ready for the road! It offers a smooth driving experience and has been cared for, showing only minor, honest signs of wear that you'd expect. It’s a solid, reliable choice that balances quality and value perfectly—ideal for someone who wants a dependable car that still looks great!

This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor cosmetic imperfections. The interior is clean with light signs of use on the upholstery. Mechanically, the car is reliable and has been well-maintained.
This car is in poor condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has several noticeable scratches and small dents. The interior shows significant wear, including staining on the upholstery. While the engine is functional, it will require maintenance soon. All mechanical systems are currently operational but show signs of age.

This vehicle is in pristine, mint condition, having been meticulously cared for and stored in a temperature-controlled environment. The exterior paint is showroom-quality with a deep, mirror-like finish and absolutely no imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in perfect state, with leather that is supple and free of any wear, and all electronics functioning as they did the day it was manufactured. It has been serviced exclusively at authorized dealerships with a full record of maintenance. This is a rare find for a discerning collector or enthusiast who demands the absolute best.

This vehicle is in poor overall condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It is best suited as a parts donor or a comprehensive restoration project for an experienced mechanic. The engine suffers from a loud internal knock and multiple significant fluid leaks, while the transmission slips consistently under load. The exterior exhibits extensive rust and paint failure, and the interior shows heavy wear, including torn upholstery and non-functional electronics. Please expect a vehicle that requires immediate and extensive mechanical and cosmetic work before it can be considered roadworthy.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our standards for road-ready performance and reliability. Featuring a clean interior and a robust powertrain, it offers a sophisticated driving experience at a highly competitive market valuation. This represents an ideal acquisition for the discerning buyer seeking dependable quality and exceptional value.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my reliable ride, and she's been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it perfect for your daily commutes or weekend getaways. It runs great and is ready for its next adventure with a new owner. Come take it for a spin!

Offering a mechanically sound 2017 Shelby GT350, featuring the high-revving 5.2L Voodoo V8 with its signature flat-plane crankshaft and 8,250 RPM redline. This chassis is equipped with MagneRide adaptive damping and a Torsen limited-slip differential with a 3.73 final drive ratio for exceptional corner-exit traction. Power is managed via a precise Tremec TR-3160 six-speed manual transmission. Recent service includes a comprehensive fluid analysis and inspection of the Brembo six-piston front calipers. The vehicle exhibits minor cosmetic wear consistent with
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. All systems functional.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of reliability and style, maintained with a high level of care. The exterior finish glows under sunlight, showing only the lightest of road wear consistent with responsible use, and remains free of major blemishes or structural concerns. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean; the seats are supportive and well-preserved, and all technological features—including the dual-zone climate control and premium audio system—operate flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, benefiting from a documented history of preventative maintenance and recent fluid flushes. The transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension provides a firm yet comfortable ride. This is a turn-key car that has been garage-kept and treated with respect, making it an ideal choice for someone seeking a dependable, high-quality vehicle without the new-car price tag.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that balances performance with enduring value. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Featuring a clean history and consistent service records, it represents a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking a reliable, high-caliber driving experience.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and sustained aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a comprehensive professional inspection, confirming its robust performance capabilities and structural soundness. A premier selection for those seeking a balance of proven reliability and sophisticated presentation.

Hey there! I'm selling my trusty ride and it has been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, so it's totally ready to hit the road for its next adventure with you! Everything runs smoothly, and it still looks great parked in the driveway. It's the perfect choice if you're looking for a reliable car that's been properly cared for. Feel free to reach out if you want to come by and take it for a spin!

This 987.1 Cayman S features the high-revving 3.4L M97 flat-six powerplant, offering a linear torque curve and exceptional throttle response. The mid-engine configuration ensures a low polar moment of inertia, paired with a tactile 6-speed manual transaxle for precise gear selection. The chassis maintains its structural rigidity, supported by a factory-tuned suspension that provides communicative feedback through the hydraulic steering rack. Deceleration is managed by four-piston aluminum monoblock calipers biting into cross-drilled rotors. Recent preventative maintenance includes a water pump replacement and a clean borescope report, ensuring the mechanical integrity of this balanced driver's machine.
Used car in good condition. Clean title. Regular maintenance performed. Minor cosmetic wear only. Reliable performance.

This meticulously maintained sedan strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday reliability. The exterior boasts a deep metallic shine, showing only minor road wear and small stone chips consistent with careful ownership. Inside, you’ll find a pristine, smoke-free cabin featuring supple leather seating with minimal wear and a fully functional suite of modern technology. Mechanically, the car is in strong standing, having recently undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection and fluid service. With a smooth-shifting transmission, responsive handling, and tires in excellent condition, it delivers a confident and comfortable driving experience. This is a solid, honest vehicle ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

Presenting a vehicle of exceptional mechanical integrity and refined aesthetic appeal. This specimen has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. Offering a sophisticated driving experience, it represents an outstanding value for the discerning motorist who prioritizes both quality and longevity.

This meticulously maintained vehicle exemplifies balanced performance and sustained reliability. Presenting in commendable condition, the automobile features a well-preserved interior and a robust drivetrain, ensuring a premium driving experience. Rigorously inspected to meet our professional standards, this unit represents an exceptional value for the discerning driver who prioritizes both mechanical integrity and sophisticated engineering.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty ride that’s been such a joy to drive. It’s been super well-maintained and still runs like a dream! It’s got plenty of life left in it and is looking for a new owner to take it on some fresh adventures. You’re going to love how smooth it feels on the road!

This E92 M3 is a driver-focused specimen featuring the high-revving S65 4.0L V8 with individual throttle bodies and a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox. Mechanical integrity is paramount; the VANOS system is quiet, and the rod bearings have been addressed as preventative maintenance. It retains a sharp turn-in thanks to a well-sorted multi-
Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Mechanically sound.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of luxury and performance. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with only minor road-wear consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary; the premium leather seats are supple and free of tears, showing only light natural creasing on the driver’s side. All electronic components, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system, function flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and quietly, backed by a comprehensive service history that ensures peace of mind. The car has been kept in a climate-controlled garage and has never been smoked in. Recent maintenance includes a fresh oil change and a multi-point inspection, confirming its mechanical integrity. This is a reliable, high-performing car ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved interior, the unit has been rigorously vetted to meet our exacting standards for quality and reliability. Offering a superior blend of sophistication and performance, this vehicle is prepared for immediate delivery.

We are pleased to offer this impeccably maintained vehicle, which exemplifies a superior balance of performance and long-term value. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, this unit remains in commendable mechanical and aesthetic order, reflecting a history of responsible ownership. It represents an ideal acquisition for the professional seeking a sophisticated, reliable driving experience without compromise.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it's been such a joy to own. It's in really wonderful shape and has been super well-loved over the years. Everything runs smoothly, and it’s just waiting for someone new to take it on a few more adventures! It’s a solid, reliable car that still looks great in the driveway. Feel free to reach out if you want to come by and take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 is powered by the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS variable valve timing system that delivers a linear power band up to an 8,000 RPM redline. Power is managed via a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a variable M differential lock for optimal traction. The chassis has been enhanced with rear subframe reinforcement plates and upgraded polyurethane bushings to ensure structural rigidity under high lateral loads. The suspension retains its factory-tuned MacPherson strut and multi-link geometry, providing precise feedback through the rack
Used vehicle. Good condition. Maintenance up to date. Clean interior. Reliable runner.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between high-end performance and daily usability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor road wear expected of a car that has been enjoyed but never abused. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of quality; the leather upholstery is supple and clean, with minimal creasing on the driver’s bolster. Mechanically, it is in excellent health, having followed a rigorous service schedule with all fluids and filters recently addressed. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the brakes provide a firm, confident bite. Whether you’re navigating a commute or a winding backroad, this car delivers a tight, responsive driving experience that feels as solid as the day it left the showroom. It is a reliable, turn-key example ready for its next owner to cherish.

This vehicle represents a sophisticated balance of performance and long-term value. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience supported by a comprehensive service history. A premier choice for the discerning driver seeking quality and proven reliability.
